topics.title: Prom Bans and Celebrity News

topics.title: Host Confronts Racist Caller
topics.summary: The studio records a heated confrontation with a caller who uses racial slurs and is subsequently warned of a service disconnection by a representative.

topics.title: Historical Figures and Celebrity Encounters

topics.title: Riley Martin and Upcoming Guest Appearances

topics.summary: The studio features John Stamos recounting past romantic encounters, his friendship with Denise Richards, and his upcoming role as a doctor on the television series ER.

topics.title: John Daly's Lifestyle and Gambling Habits
topics.summary: The studio features John Daly as he discusses his history with gambling, his personal life including his marriages, and his unconventional lifestyle involving drinking and smoking while competing in professional golf.

topics.title: Siobhan and John's Upcoming Encounter

topics.title: Snoop Dogg Ban and Studio Guest Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses Snoop Dogg's ban from the United Kingdom, upcoming radio segments featuring John Stamos and John Daly, and a comedic segment involving an intern who is the son of a regular caller.

topics.title: Interaction with Tabitha Stevens
topics.summary: The show features a segment where a guest named Tabitha Stevens is introduced to the audience, followed by a discussion regarding her availability for an intimate encounter and subsequent commentary on celebrity controversies involving Whoopi Goldberg and Hulk Hogan.

topics.title: Indecency Legislation and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses the lack of consensus on federal indecency bills, updates on American Idol contestants, the controversy surrounding The DaVinci Code, and various celebrity relationship rumors.
